name: scout-mindset
description: Evaluations for scout-mindset skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to actively seek truth vs defending existing beliefs

prompts.input: 侦察兵心态分析：我是不是因为确认偏误而坚持这个想法？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '侦察兵心态' (scout mindset) + bias recognition

prompts.input: I think my design is better, but am I biased? Help me practice scout mindset
我有偏见吗？有什么反证能说明我错了？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '我有偏见吗' (am I biased) + seeking disconfirming evidence

prompts.input: Challenge my thinking: what would convince me I'm wrong about this approach?
在这个讨论中，我是在赢辩论还是在追求真相？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: soldier vs scout mindset distinction question

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for quick action, technical issues, or when facts are clear

prompts.input: 紧急情况，需要立即做决定，没时间思考偏见
prompts.reason: Time pressure; should trigger OODA-loop not scout-mindset

prompts.input: This API is returning 500 errors. How do I fix it?
prompts.reason: Technical problem with clear solution, not a belief/bias question

prompts.input: 这个政策违反了法律，没有什么立场对错之说
prompts.reason: Clear legal facts; scout mindset doesn't apply to objective facts
